name: Vegetable Soup with Vermicelli
recipeIngredient: 8 teaspoons grated Parmesan cheese, if desired
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepot or Dutch oven, saute onions, celery, and garlic in oil until crisp-tender.
2. Stir in remaining ingredients except green beans, vermicelli, and cheese.
3. Bring to a boil; reduce heat.
4. Cover and simmer for 30 minutes.
5. Stir in green beans and vermicelli; simmer an additional 8 to 10 minutes or until vegetables and vermicelli are tender.
6. Serve with cheese.
Serves 8 (1-1/2 cup)
